graph LR
subgraph sg1 [My Subgraph]
    A --> B
end
C --> A
---
        +-----------------+
        |   My Subgraph   |
        |                 |
        |                 |
+---+   | +---+     +---+ |
|   |   | |   |     |   | |
| C |---->| A |---->| B | |
|   |   | |   |     |   | |
+---+   | +---+     +---+ |
        |                 |
        +-----------------+
